1 EDHD306 is a required course for the EDHD Minor; students may not substitute any other research course with the exception of Family Science majors who may take FMSC302 or Psychology majors and Neuroscience majors who may take PSYC300.

2 Course selections might include three credits of EDHD228

(Research Experiences in Human Development), EDHD319 (Selected Special Topics in HD), EDHD386 (Experiential Learning), EDHD489 (Field Experiences in Education), or EDHD498 (Special Problems in Education). These courses involve directed study with a faculty advisor.
